generated_query:
FOR p IN Person
  FILTER p.id == 933
  RETURN {
    id: p.id,
    firstName: p.firstName,
    lastName: p.lastName,
    birthday: p.birthday,
    creationDate: p.creationDate
  }

sql:
SELECT f.id, f.title, COUNT(*) AS member_count
FROM forum f
JOIN forum_has_member fhm ON fhm.forum_id = f.id
GROUP BY f.id, f.title
ORDER BY member_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
expected_query:
FOR f IN Forum
  LET member_count = LENGTH(FOR p IN 1..1 OUTBOUND f HAS_MEMBER RETURN 1)
  SORT member_count DESC
  LIMIT 10
  RETURN { id: f.id, title: f.title, member_count: member_count }
generated_query:
FOR f IN Forum
  FOR p IN OUTBOUND f HAS_MEMBER
    COLLECT forum_id = f.id, forum_title = f.title WITH COUNT INTO member_count
    SORT member_count DESC
    LIMIT 10
    RETURN { id: forum_id, title: forum_title, member_count: member_count }

sql:
SELECT t.id, t.name, COUNT(*) AS usage_count
FROM tag t
JOIN (
  SELECT tag_id FROM post_has_tag
  UNION ALL
  SELECT tag_id FROM comment_has_tag
) mt ON mt.tag_id = t.id
GROUP BY t.id, t.name
ORDER BY usage_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
expected_query:
FOR t IN Tag
  LET usage_count = LENGTH(
    FOR m IN 1..1 INBOUND t HAS_TAG
      FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('Post', m) OR IS_SAME_COLLECTION('Comment', m)
      RETURN 1
  )
  SORT usage_count DESC
  LIMIT 20
  RETURN { id: t.id, name: t.name, usage_count: usage_count }
generated_query:
FOR t IN Tag
  LET usage_count = LENGTH(FOR v IN INBOUND t HAS_TAG FILTER (v._id LIKE 'Post/%' OR v._id LIKE 'Comment/%') RETURN 1)
  FILTER usage_count > 0
  SORT usage_count DESC
  LIMIT 20
  RETURN { id: t.id, name: t.name, usage_count: usage_count }

sql:
SELECT p2.id, p2.first_name, p2.last_name, k.creation_date AS friendship_date
FROM person p1
JOIN knows k ON k.person_id = p1.id
JOIN person p2 ON p2.id = k.friend_id
WHERE p1.id = 933;
expected_query:
FOR p1 IN Person
  FILTER p1.id == 933
  FOR p2, k IN 1..1 OUTBOUND p1 KNOWS
    RETURN { id: p2.id, firstName: p2.firstName, lastName: p2.lastName, friendship_date: k.creationDate }
generated_query:
FOR p1 IN Person
  FILTER p1.id == 933
  FOR p2, k IN OUTBOUND p1 KNOWS
    RETURN {
      id: p2.id,
      first_name: p2.firstName,
      last_name: p2.lastName,
      friendship_date: k.creationDate
    }

sql:
SELECT po.id, po.content, p.first_name, p.last_name, t.name
FROM post po
JOIN person p ON p.id = po.creator_person_id
JOIN post_has_tag pht ON pht.post_id = po.id
JOIN tag t ON t.id = pht.tag_id
WHERE po.creation_date >= '2010-06-01' AND po.creation_date < '2010-06-02';
expected_query:
FOR po IN Post
  FILTER po.creationDate >= '2010-06-01' AND po.creationDate < '2010-06-02'
  FOR p IN 1..1 OUTBOUND po HAS_CREATOR
    FOR t IN 1..1 OUTBOUND po HAS_TAG
      RETURN { id: po.id, content: po.content, firstName: p.firstName, lastName: p.lastName, name: t.name }
generated_query:
FOR po IN Post
  FILTER po.creationDate >= '2010-06-01' AND po.creationDate < '2010-06-02'
  FOR p IN OUTBOUND po HAS_CREATOR
  FOR t IN OUTBOUND po HAS_TAG
  RETURN {
    id: po.id,
    content: po.content,
    firstName: p.firstName,
    lastName: p.lastName,
    name: t.name
  }

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p3.id, p3.first_name, p3.last_name, t.name AS shared_tag
FROM person p1
JOIN knows k1 ON k1.person_id = p1.id
JOIN knows k2 ON k2.person_id = k1.friend_id
JOIN person p3 ON p3.id = k2.friend_id
JOIN has_interest hi1 ON hi1.person_id = p1.id
JOIN has_interest hi3 ON hi3.person_id = p3.id AND hi3.tag_id = hi1.tag_id
JOIN tag t ON t.id = hi1.tag_id
WHERE p1.id = 933 AND p3.id <> p1.id;
expected_query:
FOR p1 IN Person
  FILTER p1.id == 933
  FOR p2 IN 1..1 OUTBOUND p1 KNOWS
    FOR p3 IN 1..1 OUTBOUND p2 KNOWS
      FILTER p3.id != p1.id
      FOR t IN 1..1 OUTBOUND p1 HAS_INTEREST
        FOR t3 IN 1..1 OUTBOUND p3 HAS_INTEREST
          FILTER t3.id == t.id
          RETURN DISTINCT { id: p3.id, firstName: p3.firstName, lastName: p3.lastName, shared_tag: t.name }
generated_query:
FOR p1 IN Person
  FILTER p1.id == 933
  FOR p2 IN OUTBOUND p1 KNOWS
    FOR p3 IN OUTBOUND p2 KNOWS
      FILTER p3.id != p1.id
      FOR t IN OUTBOUND p1 HAS_INTEREST
        LET is_shared = (FOR tag_match IN OUTBOUND p3 HAS_INTEREST FILTER tag_match == t RETURN 1)
        FILTER LENGTH(is_shared) > 0
        RETURN DISTINCT {
          id: p3.id,
          firstName: p3.firstName,
          lastName: p3.lastName,
          shared_tag: t.name
        }

sql:
SELECT c.id AS comment_id, c.content, c.creation_date, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM comment c
JOIN person p ON p.id = c.creator_person_id
WHERE c.reply_of_post_id = 412317942891
ORDER BY c.creation_date DESC;
expected_query:
FOR po IN Post
  FILTER po.id == 412317942891
  FOR c IN 1..1 INBOUND po REPLY_OF
    FILTER IS_SAME_COLLECTION('Comment', c)
    FOR p IN 1..1 OUTBOUND c HAS_CREATOR
      SORT c.creationDate DESC
      RETURN { comment_id: c.id, content: c.content, creationDate: c.creationDate, firstName: p.firstName, lastName: p.lastName }
generated_query:
FOR c IN Comment
  FOR post IN OUTBOUND c REPLY_OF
    FILTER post.id == 412317942891
    FOR p IN OUTBOUND c HAS_CREATOR
      SORT c.creationDate DESC
      RETURN {
        comment_id: c.id,
        content: c.content,
        creation_date: c.creationDate,
        first_name: p.firstName,
        last_name: p.lastName
      }

sql:
SELECT f.id, f.title, COUNT(fhm.person_id) AS member_count
FROM forum f
LEFT JOIN forum_has_member fhm ON fhm.forum_id = f.id
GROUP BY f.id, f.title
ORDER BY member_count DESC;
expected_query:
FOR f IN Forum
  LET member_count = LENGTH(FOR p IN 1..1 OUTBOUND f HAS_MEMBER RETURN 1)
  SORT member_count DESC
  RETURN { id: f.id, title: f.title, member_count: member_count }
generated_query:
FOR f IN Forum
  LET members = (FOR p IN OUTBOUND f HAS_MEMBER RETURN p)
  LET member_count = LENGTH(members)
  SORT member_count DESC
  RETURN { id: f.id, title: f.title, member_count: member_count }

sql:
SELECT p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name, COUNT(*) AS friend_count
FROM person p
JOIN knows k ON k.person_id = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
ORDER BY friend_count DESC;
expected_query:
FOR p IN Person
  LET friend_count = LENGTH(FOR f IN 1..1 OUTBOUND p KNOWS RETURN 1)
  FILTER friend_count > 5
  SORT friend_count DESC
  RETURN { id: p.id, firstName: p.firstName, lastName: p.lastName, friend_count: friend_count }
generated_query:
FOR p IN Person
  LET friend_count = LENGTH(FOR friend IN OUTBOUND p KNOWS RETURN 1)
  FILTER friend_count > 5
  SORT friend_count DESC
  RETURN {
    id: p.id,
    firstName: p.firstName,
    lastName: p.lastName,
    friend_count: friend_count
  }

sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM person p
JOIN post po ON po.creator_person_id = p.id
WHERE po.forum_id = 137439023186
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM person p
JOIN likes_post l ON l.person_id = p.id
JOIN post po ON po.id = l.post_id
WHERE po.forum_id = 137439023186;
expected_query:
LET creators = (
  FOR f IN Forum
    FILTER f.id == 137439023186
    FOR po IN 1..1 OUTBOUND f CONTAINER_OF
      FOR p IN 1..1 OUTBOUND po HAS_CREATOR
        RETURN DISTINCT { id: p.id, firstName: p.firstName, lastName: p.lastName }
)
LET likers = (
  FOR f IN Forum
    FILTER f.id == 137439023186
    FOR po IN 1..1 OUTBOUND f CONTAINER_OF
      FOR p IN 1..1 INBOUND po LIKES
        RETURN DISTINCT { id: p.id, firstName: p.firstName, lastName: p.lastName }
)
FOR x IN UNION_DISTINCT(creators, likers)
  RETURN x
generated_query:
LET q1 = (
  FOR f IN Forum
    FILTER f.id == 137439023186
    FOR po IN OUTBOUND f CONTAINER_OF
    FOR p IN OUTBOUND po HAS_CREATOR
    RETURN { id: p.id, firstName: p.firstName, lastName: p.lastName }
)
LET q2 = (
  FOR f IN Forum
    FILTER f.id == 137439023186
    FOR po IN OUTBOUND f CONTAINER_OF
    FOR p IN INBOUND po LIKES
    RETURN { id: p.id, firstName: p.firstName, lastName: p.lastName }
)
RETURN UNION_DISTINCT(q1, q2)

expected_query:
FOR p IN Person
  LET friend_count = LENGTH(FOR f IN 1..1 OUTBOUND p KNOWS RETURN 1)
  FILTER friend_count == 0
  RETURN { id: p.id, firstName: p.firstName, lastName: p.lastName }
generated_query:
FOR p IN Person
  FILTER LENGTH(FOR p2 IN OUTBOUND p KNOWS RETURN 1) == 0
  RETURN {
    id: p.id,
    firstName: p.firstName,
    lastName: p.lastName
  }

sql:
SELECT country.name AS country_name, COUNT(p.id) AS person_count
FROM person p
JOIN place city ON p.place_id = city.id
JOIN place country ON city.partof_id = country.id
GROUP BY country.name;
expected_query:
FOR p IN Person
  FOR city IN 1..1 OUTBOUND p IS_LOCATED_IN
    FOR country IN 1..1 OUTBOUND city IS_PART_OF
      COLLECT name = country.name WITH COUNT INTO person_count
      RETURN { country_name: name, person_count: person_count }
generated_query:
FOR p IN Person
  FOR city IN OUTBOUND p IS_LOCATED_IN
    FOR country IN OUTBOUND city IS_PART_OF
      COLLECT country_name = country.name WITH COUNT INTO person_count
      RETURN { country_name: country_name, person_count: person_count }

sql:
WITH RECURSIVE place_hierarchy AS (
  SELECT id, name, type, partof_id, 0 AS depth
  FROM place
  WHERE id = 111
  UNION ALL
  SELECT p.id, p.name, p.type, p.partof_id, ph.depth + 1
  FROM place p
  JOIN place_hierarchy ph ON p.id = ph.partof_id
)
SELECT id, name, type, depth
FROM place_hierarchy
ORDER BY depth;
generated_query:
FOR v IN Place
  FILTER v.id == 111
  FOR node, edge, path IN 0..100 OUTBOUND v IS_PART_OF
    SORT LENGTH(path.edges) ASC
    RETURN {
      id: node.id,
      name: node.name,
      type: node.type,
      depth: LENGTH(path.edges)
    }
